summary: P2 Features Testing Complete - Driving Score & Orion Tips (Premium feature) and Challenge Friend feature. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Driving Score endpoint returns 6 metrics with scores, trends, and descriptions
Orion Tips are generated based on lowest scoring metrics with priority order (high, medium, low)
Challenge creation correctly validates gem balance before allowing stake
Stake options (50, 100, 250, 500 gems) correctly disabled when user lacks sufficient gems
Premium upsell modal correctly shown for Basic users when accessing Driving Score
Challenge buttons (⚔️) correctly shown for non-current-user entries in Leaderboard
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: User starts with 0 gems, so stake options 250/500 are correctly disabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features (Driving Score, Orion Tips, Challenge Friend) complete. User starts with 0 gems so cannot create challenges. Basic users see premium upsell for Driving Score.

driving_score_endpoint.metrics_count: 6 metrics (speed, braking, acceleration, following, turns, focus)

driving_score_ui_basic_user.profile_card: Driving Score card visible with PREMIUM badge

premium_upsell_modal.description: Unlock detailed driving insights and personalized tips from Orion

expected_features: 6 metric cards with scores and trends

stake_options.250_gems: PASS - High Risk (DISABLED - user has 0 gems)
stake_options.500_gems: PASS - Extreme Risk (DISABLED - user has 0 gems)

challenge_rules.rule_1: Highest average Safety Score during challenge wins
challenge_rules.rule_2: Winner takes all staked gems (100 total)
challenge_rules.rule_3: Both drivers earn bonus XP regardless of outcome

create_challenge.validation: Correctly rejects when user has insufficient gems

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. Driving metrics are randomized around user's safety score. Challenges stored in-memory.
